subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! Verily, this faithful and assured handmaiden of Thine, firm in Thy Oneness, is enkindled with the fire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان امتک الرحمانیه المومنه الموقنه بکلمتک الفردانیه المشتعله بالنار
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @soul; spirit after death
